title: Fix multiple bugs in Book Library API and frontend
instruction: The Book Library web app has multiple bugs affecting both backend and frontend. Read app.py, templates/index.html, and static/app.js to understand the full stack. Fix these issues in app.py: (1) PUT /api/books/<id> should update the updated_at timestamp, (2) DELETE /api/books/<id> should remove the book from reading lists first to avoid FK constraint errors, (3) POST /api/reading-list should validate that the book_id actually exists, (4) GET /api/stats should calculate average_rating excluding NULL ratings. Run test_fullstack.py to verify your fixes.
difficulty_rationale: Multiple interacting API, database, and frontend-context bugs requiring regression-safe repair.
